changeList: 2.1.232-1-601ab26: PR #141 - docs: add troubleshooting guidance for partial social profile downloads (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/141) — ### Motivation - Users report profile rips (e.g. Facebook profile home pages) returning only a few images because profile/home feeds expose thumbnails and many small UI assets which RipMe filters out by minimum-size chec
